minimax_m1.name: MiniMax M1
minimax_m1.notes: 456B total / 45.9B active MoE. Lightning attention. 1M context.

judge_gemini.name: Gemini 3.1 Pro
judge_gemini.notes: EXTERNAL JUDGE. Third family, no MiniMax/Western bias.

methodology.judging: External frontier judges (Claude, GPT, Gemini) + MiniMax peer judging. No model judges only itself.
methodology.comparability: 10 of 13 questions identical to Project Qwen for cross-family comparison.
methodology.meta_questions: 3 questions test self-critique, iterative improvement, and recursive optimization — targeting M2.7's self-evolution claims.

purpose: First independent blind evaluation of MiniMax M2.7 (released March 18, 2026). 6 MiniMax models across 4 generations + 3 external frontier judges. Includes 3 meta-reasoning questions testing self-improvement capabilities.
